Stop Letting Them Quietly Collect My Data — Disabling Personalized Ads on Google and Facebook
Heads up — this isn't a "block all ads" post. It's a "minimize what these platforms quietly collect about you" post.

Last note — you can't actually turn off ads. If privacy is really important to you, the only way out is being aggressive — hide every annoying ad you see in your feed:
Over time, less of your behavior gets useful for ad targeting. But the only foolproof way to stop tracking is to go fully offline and become a hermit.
So my actual recommendation — turn personalization
, learn the settings, tune the categories you don't want. At least the ads you do see are ones you actually want.
